config.security_proxy.disabled_desc: Enable to deploy a managed Caddy reverse proxy in Docker with automatic TLS, rate limiting, IP filtering, and more.
config.security_proxy.tls_desc: Configure the domain and Let's Encrypt TLS certificate. Leave domain empty for port-only mode.
config.security_proxy.rate_limit_desc: Limit requests per client IP to protect against abuse.
config.security_proxy.ip_filter_desc: Tillad eller blokér adgang baseret på klient-IP-adresser eller CIDR-intervaller.
config.security_proxy.basic_auth_desc: Require username and password before accessing the proxy.
config.security_proxy.basic_auth_vault_h: Gem legitimationsoplysninger i Secrets Vault som 'proxy_basic_auth_user' og 'proxy_basic_auth_pass'.
config.security_proxy.geo_desc: Blokér adgang baseret på geografisk placering (kræver MaxMind-database).
config.security_proxy.geo_placeholder: Geo-blocking vil være tilgængelig i en fremtidig opdatering (V2).
config.security_proxy.routes_desc: Route additional domains through the proxy to local services.
